title: NLP-020-how-to-handle-noisy-text-from-social-media原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-020 How to handle noisy text from social media?

 20. How to handle noisy text from social media?
答案要点:
预处理步骤:
1. 移除 URL、@mentions、hashtags 符号
2. 表情符号处理 (保留或转义)
3. 拼写纠正 (SymSpell, Nori)
4. 标准化 (重复字符 "soooo" → "so")
5. 俚语/缩写词典映射

质量评分: 91/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

---

Difficulty: ⭐⭐⭐
